injuryGuidance.Knee: Knee: partial ROM only, no deep flexion, no plyometrics
injuryGuidance.Shoulder: Shoulder: reduce overhead pressing volume, prioritise rotator cuff pre-hab
injuryGuidance.Rotator Cuff: Rotator Cuff: no behind-neck movements, face pulls mandatory, lighter overhead
injuryGuidance.Lower Back: Lower Back: no barbell squats/deadlifts — cable pull-throughs substituted
injuryGuidance.Hip / Pelvic Floor: Hip/Pelvic Floor: avoid heavy loaded hip flexion, hip hinge adaptations applied
injuryGuidance.Elbow: Elbow: neutral grip prioritised, reduced bicep/tricep isolation volume
injuryGuidance.Hamstring: Hamstring: no sprints, RDLs replaced with leg curls, eccentric loading only
injuryGuidance.Ankle / Plantar Fasciitis: Ankle/PF: no calf-loading, standing replaced with seated where possible

Konjac / Shirataki.description: Zero carb. Rice, noodles & pasta replaced with shirataki. Rinse well, dry-fry 2–3 min.
Konjac / Shirataki.aiInstruction: Substitute any rice with konjac/shirataki rice, any noodles or pasta with shirataki noodles. Include prep note: rinse thoroughly, dry-fry 2–3 min to remove odour, add to sauce last. Show macros for konjac version (near-zero carb).

Cauliflower Swaps.description: Near-zero carb. Cauliflower rice & pizza base. Roast or microwave, squeeze out moisture.
Cauliflower Swaps.aiInstruction: Substitute rice with cauliflower rice, pizza bases with cauliflower base. Include prep note: microwave 5 min or roast, squeeze moisture with cloth before use.

High-Protein Pasta.description: Lower carb, higher protein. Chickpea, edamame or lentil pasta. Works with most sauces.
High-Protein Pasta.aiInstruction: Substitute pasta and noodles with chickpea, edamame or lentil pasta. Show protein and carb macros for the high-protein version — significantly higher protein, lower carb than regular pasta.

Keto Alternatives.description: Keto-friendly. Almond flour, coconut flour, keto bread. Texture differs from originals.
Keto Alternatives.aiInstruction: Where recipes use flour, bread or wraps, suggest almond flour, coconut flour or keto bread alternatives. Flag that texture differs and note where the substitution works best.
